clusters.justification: These terms reflect the functional outputs of the salience and somatomotor-limbic circuitry driving emotional reactivity, interoception, and physiological arousal.
This cluster maps onto mesolimbic-cortical pathways responsible for computing utility, reinforcement learning, and guiding motivated decision-making.
These concepts coalesce around default mode network activity, underlying the generation of internal representations required for interpersonal navigation and self-referential thought.
